calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Sharon Stetson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Helen Bacalski ind and dba Jalamo Boutique as follows:
Principal of $47,891.68
Interest $11,683.36
Attorney's fees of $2,561.50
Costs of $445.30
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Sept. 2, 2004
Proposed Judgment rec'd, granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
